title: polypodiidae
intro: The rank Polypodiidae is a suborder of plants that consists of ferns and their allies, specifically those within the class Polypodiopsida. It is a division of the class that groups related orders together. Examples of orders within the Polypodiidae include the Osmundales, Hymenophthalles, and Polypodiales orders, which may include the Aspleniaceae, Dryopteridaceae, and Polypodiaceae families.

orders.order_desc: Cyatheales is an order of seedless vascular plants, commonly known as tree ferns, within the class Polypodiopsida of the division Pteridophyta.
